publishedAbstract: - The starting point is a RHOCP 4 cluster using the integrated OpenShift image registry backed by a `PersistentVolume`- The integrated OpenShift image registry already contains images- It is required to migrate the existing data to a S3 object storage bucket provided by RHODF 4- How can the registry be migrated from a OpenShift volume to S3 object storage?
publishedTitle: Migrating the OpenShift integrated image registry from PersistentVolume to S3 object storage provided by OpenShift Data Foundation
